content: Audit all eco_* and missing image references across the codebase
Update brand.js — remove eco_* references, map all keys to existing art_*/tahoe_/sprinter_/logo_ files
Refactor HomePage, ServicesPage, AboutPage, ExecutiveProtectionPage — replace eco* refs with art_* / vehicle photos, drop unmappable tiles
Verify pages with screenshot tool: Home, Fleet, Experience, Reviews, Booking, Contact (zero broken images)
